subject: A young green dragon perched atop a mound of bones and debris, mouth open, with leathery wings partially spread against a daytime sky
description: A juvenile dragon in muted green tones crouches on a pile of bones, antlers, dirt, and plant matter. Its wings are partly open but lowered, their inner surface showing a warm orange-brown. The dragon's mouth is open, revealing teeth, and its large golden-amber eye is clearly visible. The posture is alert and curious rather than aggressive. The background shows a blue sky with wispy clouds, and distant rocky terrain with small flying figures. A flower with red-pink petals is visible in the lower foreground. The painting style is detailed and naturalistic.
foreground: young green dragon on bone mound with flowers
background: blue sky, wispy clouds, rocky terrain, distant fliers
